---
name: "🏗️ Suggest a project"
about: Propose a new buildable AI engineering portfolio project for the catalog
title: "[Project] "
labels: ["project", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Project title
<!-- e.g. "Corrective RAG with a hallucination checker" -->

## Theme
<!-- Which catalog file? RAG apps · Agents · Evals & LLMOps · Fine-tuning · Multimodal · Structured extraction · LLM from-scratch · Production & serving · Prompt & DSPy · GTM & AI-PM -->

## What you build (one or two sentences)


## Skills it proves
<!-- concrete, hiring-manager-creditable skills, e.g. "hybrid retrieval, re-ranking, faithfulness evals" -->

## Difficulty
- [ ] 🟢 Beginner
- [ ] 🟡 Intermediate
- [ ] 🔴 Advanced

## Reference(s) — required
<!-- At least one typed, annotated, license-noted link. Type tags: 📄 paper · 📘 docs · 🎬 video · 🧑‍🏫 course · 🛠️ tool · 💻 repo -->
-

## Buildability check
- [ ] Can be built on a laptop, free-tier GPU, or modest API budget (or requirements are noted)
- [ ] It's genuinely distinct from projects already in the catalog
- [ ] Any referenced code to adapt is MIT / Apache-2.0 / CC0 (or the license is flagged)
